title: Mission Cell Starter Path V1
summary: First startable mission-cell operating form for bounded self-improvement on top of the current Paperclip carrier.

charter.objective: Start a reusable mission cell through one durable contract reference, one bounded issue packet, and one promotion path that does not require David to restate the lane every few minutes.
charter.primaryMetric: A bounded self-improvement mission can be started, carried, evaluated, and promoted from repo truth instead of chat reconstruction.
guardMetrics: No Type-1 action is executed without explicit escalation.
No unbounded platform or provider expansion is opened.
The lane reduces supervision instead of creating AI oversight theater.
charter.budget: One long autonomous branch-sized mission with multiple sister cuts allowed.
charter.runtime: 24-72h reviewable autonomous lane with midpoint commits/pushes allowed.

type2Autonomy: bounded branch edits inside the stated blast radius
prompt, template, routing, CLI, and contract improvements before promotion
targeted replay, eval, and harness improvements that stay reversible
type1Escalations: main branch mutation outside normal reviewed merge flow
global policy changes beyond the current mission cell
escalationPath: stop at the boundary instead of guessing
record the exact blocker and why it is Type-1
escalate to David or the Oberreviewer gate with concrete evidence

oberreviewerTriggers: a true Type-1 boundary is reached
the mission cell keeps tripping risk because it is cut too wide
promotion would affect default behavior without enough replay or guard evidence
requiredEvidence: prompt or wakeup context truth when runtime behavior depends on it
stopReasons: remaining work has widened into a new megascope

replayChecks: missionCell reference resolves to an active contract
issue prompt contains the mission-cell operating brief
assignment context carries mission-cell references without chat-only glue
guardChecks: Type-1 and Type-2 actions remain explicitly separated
Oberreviewer triggers stay narrow and exceptional
promotion still requires reviewable gain instead of mere production
successSignals: the mission-cell contract validates through CLI
a future issue can start from `missionCell: mission-cell-starter-path-v1`
the resulting brief answers start, decision, escalation, risk, eval, and promotion questions directly

promoteWhen: the same start path can be reused without re-deriving the lane in chat
guard metrics stay intact on the same path
reviewable evidence shows lower supervision or higher mission-carrying capability
stayExperimentalWhen: the cut only works in one local session
evidence is narrative without prompt, test, or git proof
the lane still depends on fragile human restatement
demoteWhen: the bridge injects stale or misleading mission truth
risk gating fires continuously because the mission is malformed
promotion creates more oversight load than autonomy leverage

firmBound: durable mission-cell starter docs and contract
carrierBound: current Paperclip issue and heartbeat transport

starterPath.trigger: Create or update a bounded issue with `missionCell: mission-cell-starter-path-v1` plus explicit execution packet truth.
startupSequence: Validate the mission-cell contract with `paperclipai mission cell validate`.
Reference the mission cell in the issue description.
Let the runtime bridge inject the mission-cell brief into prompt and wakeup context.
Carry Type-2 work autonomously inside the stated blast radius.
Escalate only at true Type-1 or Oberreviewer triggers.
Promote only after replay, guard, and review truth exist.
firstProbe: Read the issue prompt context and confirm the mission-cell brief is present.
Read assignment wakeup context and confirm mission-cell references survived handoff.
Run the targeted tests that protect the bridge and the starter contract.
